name: New Species Descriptions
description: Newly discovered and described species relevant to aquariums.

name: Bacterial Diseases
description: Pathogenic bacteria such as Mycobacteria, Vibrio, Aeromonas.

name: Parasites & Protists
description: Ecto and endoparasites, including Ich, Velvet, flukes, and copepods.

name: Viral Diseases
description: Viruses affecting aquatic life (e.g., iridovirus, megalocytivirus).

name: Water Quality & Chemistry
description: Nitrogen cycle, pH, osmoregulation, and toxicity.

name: Reproduction & Breeding
description: Captive breeding, spawning behavior, and larval rearing.

name: Antimicrobial Resistance
description: AMR prevalence in ornamental fish and aquatic environments.

name: Invasive Species
description: Aquarium species introduced into non-native environments (e.g., Lionfish, Plecos).
